changelog: `src/components/options/recorder/use-recorder-visualisation-controller.ts`: split 244-line orchestrator hook into a 10-line composer plus three focused sub-hooks under `recorder/visualisation/`: `use-recorder-step-selection.ts` (auto-select + selector fetching effects), `use-recorder-step-mutations.ts` (rename/delete/description/tags/link handlers), `use-recorder-selftest-export.ts` (self-test runner + export). Every extracted function is under the 15-line cap; the top-level composer is under 15 lines. Zero behavioural change.
